assessment_meta.notes: Real manual screen using listing evidence plus limited public planning-context checks. Conservative placeholders retained where authoritative site-report fields were not fully verified in-session.

site.access_notes: Quiet cul-de-sac residential access. No explicit corner or dual-access advantage identified in this pass.

residential_subdivision_use_case.notes: Residential subdivision screening is relevant, though listing is renovation/add-value oriented rather than subdivision-led.

effective_yield.notes: 708sqm is a useful raw size, but without planning verification no indicative lot count should be asserted.

critical_unknowns: Minimum lot size / subdivision threshold not verified
Steep land / landslide status not checked
next_actions: Verify zone and local plan / precinct
